treatment_information.treatment_response: Wound had not improved significantly after taking 8 days of Keflex.
Pt was transferred to the floor after administration.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: One (1) Tablet PO daily for 5 days.
One (1) Tablet PO every twelve (12) hours for 5 days.

treatment_timeline.event: Started on Keflex for presumed cellulitis.
Presented to the ED for further evaluation after 8 days of Keflex.
Administered 1 dose of Vancomycin in the ED.
Discharged with oral antibiotics including Bactrim DS and Augmentin.

patient_outcome.final_status: Afebrile, hemodynamically stable, and minimal pain.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Pt was pleasant and cooperative; denied significant pain and discomfort.
